productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Jacket
description: Composition Grey jacket with the shell made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester and trim fabric made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a ribbed neck, buttoned front placket, blue and red striping on the collar, cuffs, and hem, and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and a bright tee, or wear unzipped with a monochrome tee and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
